description: Roadmap of tasks for implementing and improving the real AI Speaking voice feature, including chosen voice configurations, Google Cloud STT, and local Piper TTS integration.

phases.name: Fix and Implement Real AI Speaking Voice
phases.description: Establish the end-to-end voice speaking framework using Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and local Piper Text-to-Speech, integrating it seamlessly with database migrations, quotas, gamification, and front-end interfaces.

modules.name: Backend Voice Architecture & Speaking Session
modules.description: Implement DB schema changes, register voice configurations, REST/WebSocket API endpoints, and media transcription/synthesis engines.

tasks.title: Add voice_name to users table and generate Alembic migration
tasks.description: Add voice_name column with default value hfc_female to User SQLAlchemy model and create a clean, SQLite-compatible Alembic migration applying the schema update.
acceptance_criteria: User model has voice_name Mapped column with default 'hfc_female'
Alembic migration is generated and successfully upgrades the local SQLite database without errors

tasks.title: Implement GET /auth/voices endpoint in auth router
tasks.description: Create a public API endpoint in auth router to return a list of available local Piper voices for registration setup.
acceptance_criteria: GET /auth/voices returns a JSON array of dict objects containing voice id and descriptive names

tasks.title: Update register request schema and AuthService user instantiation
tasks.description: Add voice_name field to RegisterRequest and UserResponse schemas. Update register method in AuthService to store user selected voice.
acceptance_criteria: RegisterRequest supports optional or defaulted voice_name string
UserResponse contains voice_name string
User record is created with the select voice_name in registration

tasks.title: Create REST start/end endpoints in speaking router
tasks.description: Create speaking REST router with start and end routes. start verifies daily speaking quota and returns a session ID. end calculates time spent, awards 30 XP, updates streak, checks level progress, and triggers achievement evaluations.
acceptance_criteria: POST /speaking/start returns a unique session ID
POST /speaking/end increments daily usage quota, records activity in gamification, and awards XP

tasks.title: Implement real-time WebSocket speaking endpoint
tasks.description: Create ws/speaking/{session_id} WebSocket handler. Handler authenticates user via token, transcribes user input audio bytes using Google Cloud STT, calls Vertex AI to stream response, synthesizes final text response to WAV bytes using local Piper TTS, and plays audio on client side.
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket accepts connection with valid JWT token
Audio frames are transcribed by SpeechToTextService
Gemini generates response streamed to client
Full response text is synthesized using TextToSpeechService and user voice settings

modules.name: Frontend Speaking User Experience
modules.description: Build UI fields for voice configuration and the immersive Speaking session screen.

tasks.title: Add voice selection dropdown in user registration page
tasks.description: Fetch available voices from GET /auth/voices and display as a styled dropdown in the registration form. Validate input via Zod schema and include in registration payload.
acceptance_criteria: Registration page has a functional voice selection dropdown
Form submission fails if no voice is selected
Selected voice is passed to register mutation call

tasks.title: Transition auth RTK Query endpoints to real integration
tasks.description: Change RTK Query mock queryFn handlers in authApi.ts to real HTTP queries matching backend POST /auth/register and POST /auth/login routes.
acceptance_criteria: Authentication requests communicate with actual backend database

tasks.title: Create Speaking session page with visual pulse and mic recorder
tasks.description: Create front-end speaking page. Capture microphone input using Web Audio API, encode to 16kHz mono WAV chunks, connect to WebSocket, stream text chunks, play returned audio, and display session controls.
acceptance_criteria: Web Audio recording converts Float32Array to 16kHz Int16 mono WAV
WebSocket client establishes connection and handles chunk/audio events
Page displays glowing visual pulse reflecting audio state
End session calls end REST endpoint and redirects to dashboard

tasks.title: Integrate AI Speaking in navigation and Quick Actions
tasks.description: Add AI Speaking links to app layout side navigation, mobile bottom tab bar, and dashboard Quick Actions bento grid.
acceptance_criteria: User can navigate to /speaking from any app screen
